cases.expected_sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', p.fecha) AS mes, SUM(lp.cantidad * lp.precio_unitario) AS ingresos FROM ventas.lineas_pedido AS lp JOIN ventas.pedidos AS p ON lp.pedido_id = p.id WHERE p.estado <> 'cancelado' GROUP BY mes ORDER BY mes LIMIT 100

cases.prompt: Que producto ha generado mas ingresos?
cases.expected_sql: SELECT pr.nombre AS producto, SUM(lp.cantidad * lp.precio_unitario) AS ingresos FROM ventas.lineas_pedido AS lp JOIN ventas.productos AS pr ON lp.producto_id = pr.id JOIN ventas.pedidos AS p ON lp.pedido_id = p.id WHERE p.estado <> 'cancelado' GROUP BY pr.nombre ORDER BY ingresos DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT canal, SUM(minutos) AS minutos FROM soporte.interacciones GROUP BY canal ORDER BY minutos DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT prioridad, COUNT(*) AS tickets FROM soporte.tickets WHERE estado IN ('abierto', 'en_progreso') GROUP BY prioridad ORDER BY tickets DESC LIMIT 100
